failures.description: The agent made an ill-formed ProductCatalogSearch call by omitting the required string field product_type.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user wanted a catalog search for available Electric Kettles with capacity 1.5L and price greater than 147.46. The required value product_type='Electric Kettle' was available from the user task and the coordinator plan. The ProductCatalogSearch schema also stated product_type was required. The agent invoked the tool without product_type, and the runtime returned a SchemaError.
